intent: Write a 3-source report on 'indoor air quality products that make a real difference'. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the health-household and home-kitchen categories and collect at least 4 relevant products (air purifier, humidifier, dehumidifier, HEPA filter). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/science AND /f/LifeProTips for posts on indoor air quality evidence, ionizer skepticism, or HEPA vs marketing claims. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. (3) Wikipedia — open 'Indoor air quality' and 'HEPA' articles and extract 3-4 facts. The report must: (a) present storefront picks with stats, (b) check each product's implied claims against Wikipedia, (c) integrate community warnings on ionizers and ozone-generating devices, (d) close with a 'keep, question, skip' verdict for each pick. Cite every claim.
